message:
fix(core): bound try_next() lagged retry loop to prevent CPU spin

FilteredEventStream::try_next() could theoretically spin indefinitely
if a rapid producer overflows the broadcast buffer between every
try_recv() call, producing repeated Lagged errors without ever
returning Empty.

Add a small retry bound (3 consecutive Lagged errors) after which
try_next() returns None, yielding control back to the caller. The
counter resets on any successful recv (including filtered events),
so normal operation with occasional lag is unaffected.

The async next() method is not affected because recv().await yields
to the runtime between iterations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
